Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 read with applicable SEBI Circulars, we are pleased to inform the Stock Exchanges that Shreeji Shipping Global Limited ( the Company ) has received approval from the Income Tax Department for opting into the Tonnage Tax Scheme ( TTS ) under Chapter XII-G of the Income-tax Act, 1961 in respect of its eligible qualifying inland vessels engaged in the shipping business.The approval shall be effective from Financial Year 2025-26, subject to compliance with the applicable provisions of the Income-tax Act, 1961 and rules framed thereunder.The approval marks a significant milestone for the Company and reinforces its position in the inland shipping sector. The Company believes that the Tonnage Tax Scheme framework is expected to provide enhanced long-term tax visibility for its eligible shipping operations, which will have a positive impact on the Company s profitability and cash flows over the long term.The approval is also expected to strengthen the Company s long-term growth strategy and support operational scalability.The above information is being disclosed in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
